</abox>

Thus, the target image belongs to Class34.
</dl_explanation>
<response>34</response>

- Class81 sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([broad multi-petaled flower petals])

This confirms the Target Image belongs to Class81.
</dl_explanation>
<response>81</response>
